description: An implementation project has been completed, and the consultant needs to get formal sign-off from the customer.

nodes.task_description: Review the original SOW to ensure all deliverables have been met.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant confirms the project is complete.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a project completion document summarizing the work done and outcomes.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant creates the final sign-off document.

nodes.task_description: Send the document to the customer for their final signature to officially close the project.
